doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The document invents subsections, definitions, and paralegal supervision provisions not found in the actual ABA Model Rule 5.5, which focuses on multijurisdictional practice rather than the fabricated content presented here.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 90
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice of law and does not contain subsections with the specific language, structure, or prescriptive paralegal supervision rules shown here; the document invents detailed provisions (especially subsections (a) and (b)) not present in the real rule, and the claimed "last amended February 2023" date and fabricated disciplinary-body claims further indicate this is not authentic ABA source material.
